summary:
Cleared stale cache entries on product writes so updates and creates now invalidate `products:{id}` and any `products:list*` entries (`app/server.py:82`, `app/server.py:97`).  
- Invalidated the product detail cache after updates to avoid serving old fields.  
- Dropped cached product listings after both updates and creates so the collection reflects new items immediately.

Tests: `./test.sh`

Next steps: 1) Commit the changes.
